title: Wither Storm Enhanced
description: Based around Cracker's Wither Storm with some performance improvements and shader support, alongside a few resource packs. The best way to enjoy the Wither Storm challenge, now on 1.20!
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

Wither Storm Enhanced is a simple challenge modpack based around [Cracker's Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod/changelog), with performance improvements, shaders and a couple extra mods. To preserve the challenge, the only mod that changes vanilla content is the Wither Storm mod - the rest just help the pack run better, with optimisation and visual improvements, in addition to free multiplayer support through [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc).

_My own personal challenge rules are as such, if you'd like to try a similar format._

- Hard difficulty
- You spawn in survival and have the first day to gear up
- On the first sunrise, you must be within the house at 0,0 and summon the Wither Storm
- Then you run like hell
